message: Fix bonding: keep GATT open during createBond, close after success
Add debug log copy button on connecting screen, show failure state
GATT-first bonding, debug log collector with copy-to-clipboard
Rewrite Android transport: BLE GATT → Classic RFCOMM for GAIA
Fix bonding race, receiver leak, Android 13+ compat
Fix Android pairing (createBond), dedup scan results, match reference UI labels
Fix Android BLE scanning, add shake-to-toggle mock for preview
Fix crash: link native earbuds module, fallback to mock when unavailable
Fix Expo upload command — eas upload with --build-path
Exclude web from platforms — fix OTA export
Sync tab with device domain changes
Fix install page metadata — export shell vars for node
Fix Xcode version, ANDROID_HOME/JAVA_HOME, profile-based bundle IDs
